page_content:
Prerequisite: ENFP312.

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Fire Protection program; and permission of ENGR-Fire Protection Engineering department.

Credit Only Granted for. ENFP489W, ENFP629W, or ENFP667. Formerly: ENFP489W.

ENFP489 Special Topics (3 Credits)

Selected topics of current importance to fire protection. Prerequisite: Permission of ENGR-Fire Protection Engineering department.
